project_privacy_data_flows.description: User creates a new Wikipedia account. Requires username, password, optional email, and may require CAPTCHA verification. Data sent to createaccount API.

flow_steps.details: User fills in username, password, and optional email for account creation. CAPTCHA may be required.

flow_steps.code: @FormUrlEncoded @POST(MW_API_PREFIX + "action=createaccount&createmessageformat=html") suspend fun postCreateAccount(@Field("username") user: String, @Field("password") pass: String, @Field("retype") retype: String, @Field("email") email: String?, @Field("captchaId") captchaId: String?, @Field("captchaWord") captchaWord: String?, ...)
flow_steps.details: Username, password, retype, and optional email sent to MediaWiki createaccount API. CAPTCHA response included if required.
On successful account creation, username and password are passed back to LoginActivity and auto-login is performed.
